product_overview: SmartPark ITS is a real-time smart parking platform that lets drivers find available slots, book parking, and view receipts after ending a booking. Administrators can manage slots and review booking activity, while users can update profile and parking system settings.
core_goals: Discover live parking slot availability on the map or dashboard
Register and log in to access a personal parking account
Reserve an available parking slot by providing a vehicle number
End an active parking booking and review the resulting receipt
Review and manage personal booking history
Update profile information, password, and system-related settings
For administrators, manage parking slots and review bookings and analytics

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Create a new user account with identity and credential information.
user_flows: Navigate to /register -> Enter name -> Enter email address -> Enter password -> Submit the registration form -> See account creation result
Navigate to /register -> Enter invalid registration details -> Submit the registration form -> See validation feedback

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate into an existing account using email and password.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Enter email address -> Enter password -> Submit the login form -> See the authenticated dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Enter incorrect credentials -> Submit the login form -> See an invalid credentials message

features.name: Parking Discovery and Dashboard
features.description: View available parking slots, booking status, and a map of parking availability.
user_flows: Navigate to /map -> View the parking map and slot availability
Navigate to /dashboard -> View the list of parking slots and active bookings
Navigate to /dashboard -> Select an available slot -> Proceed to the booking flow

features.name: Book Parking Slot
features.description: Reserve a specific parking slot by providing a vehicle number and confirming the booking.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Select an available slot -> Enter vehicle number -> Optionally scan a plate -> Confirm the booking -> See the booking confirmed
Navigate to /book/1 -> Enter vehicle number -> Confirm the booking -> See the booking confirmed

features.name: My Bookings and Exit
features.description: Review personal bookings, end an active booking, and view the receipt for the completed stay.
user_flows: Navigate to /my_bookings -> View the list of bookings -> Select an active booking -> Exit the booking -> See the completed booking receipt
Navigate to /receipt/1 -> View receipt details and charges

features.name: User Settings
features.description: Update profile details, change password, and adjust system-related settings.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings/ -> Update name and email -> Toggle email notifications -> Save changes -> See updated profile settings
Navigate to /settings/ -> Enter current password -> Enter new password -> Confirm the new password -> Submit the password change -> See password update confirmation
Navigate to /settings/ -> Update pricing or reservation system settings -> Save changes -> See updated system settings

features.name: Admin Management
features.description: Manage parking slots, view all bookings, and review admin analytics.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/ -> View the admin dashboard and analytics summary
Navigate to /admin/slots -> Add a new slot -> See the slot appear in the slot list
Navigate to /admin/slots -> Toggle a slot's status -> See the slot status change

features.name: Admin Analytics
features.description: Review operational analytics related to parking activity and slot usage.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/analytics -> View analytics and performance metrics

routes.description: Landing page with links to dashboard, login and register
User dashboard listing parking slots and active bookings
Book a specific parking slot (GET form, POST confirm)
View receipt for a completed booking
List of the current user's bookings

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Create a new account with name, email and password
user_interactions: See validation/error message on invalid input

features.name: User Login
user_interactions: See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: User Dashboard
features.description: View available parking slots and active bookings
user_interactions: Click a slot to begin booking

features.name: Book Parking Slot
features.description: Reserve a parking slot, entering a vehicle number (with optional ANPR plate scan)
user_interactions: Click Confirm Booking button to submit

features.name: My Bookings & Exit
features.description: View own bookings and end an active booking, then view receipt
user_interactions: Click Exit on an active booking

features.name: User Settings
features.description: Update profile, change password, and update system settings
user_interactions: Update name/email and toggle email notifications

features.name: Admin Management
features.description: Admin dashboard, analytics, slot management, and all-bookings view

features.name: REST API v1
features.description: JSON API for auth, slots, lots, bookings, forecast, ANPR and analytics
